member.name: P:Shorten.Areas.Domain.UrlMapping.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the mapping identifier.

member.name: P:Shorten.Areas.Domain.UrlMapping.OriginalUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the original long URL.

member.name: P:Shorten.Areas.Domain.UrlMapping.ShortenedUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the shortened URL.
